_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Batch planner ignores explicit Depends on / Blocks declarations in design documents

steps.description: Backend: new orch/design_doc_parser.py (parse_dependencies + strip_excluded_sections); wire parser into iw register to persist depends_on/blocks (with self-dep filter and Blocks inversion); refactor extract_affected_files() in batch_planner.py to skip Out-of-Scope/Notes sections
Code review of S01 (parser + register integration + planner refactor)

Tests: parser unit tests; planner regression tests for BATCH-00064 scenario + Blocks inversion + section-aware extraction; register integration test (persistence + Blocks inversion + missing-target warning + self-dep filter)
Code review of S03 (tests — semantic correctness check, Boundary Behavior coverage)
